things.name: Christchurch Botanic Gardens
things.description: 30-hectare garden in the heart of the city — punting on the Avon River through the gardens is unmissable

things.name: Akaroa Day Trip
things.description: French colonial harbour village 80 km south — swim with Hector's dolphins, the world's smallest

things.name: Canterbury Museum
things.description: Superb free museum covering Antarctic exploration, Maori culture and the remarkable post-earthquake story

things.name: Christchurch Cathedral (Transitional)
things.description: The iconic Cardboard Cathedral — temporary replacement for the earthquake-damaged cathedral, now an art icon

things.name: Port Hills Gondola
things.description: Cable car to the volcanic rim of Lyttleton Harbour — panoramic views of the city, Southern Alps and ocean

things.name: Arthur's Pass Day Trip
things.description: Spectacular alpine pass through the Southern Alps — kea parrots, mountain hikes and the TranzAlpine train

things.name: International Antarctic Centre
things.description: Experience Antarctic conditions in the Hagglund ride and Snow & Ice Experience — next to the airport

things.name: Punting on the Avon
things.description: Guided punts along the willow-lined Avon River through the centre of the city — quintessentially Christchurch

things.name: New Regent Street
things.description: Pastel Spanish Mission-style pedestrian lane with boutique shops, cafes and the Christchurch tram

things.name: Willowbank Wildlife Reserve
things.description: The best place to see kiwi birds — nocturnal kiwi house and authentic Maori cultural show
